name: DarkPool DEX
description: Privacy-preserving decentralized exchange using zero-knowledge proofs for hidden order books. Trade without revealing your strategy.

name: Whisper Protocol
description: End-to-end encrypted messaging protocol built on decentralized infrastructure. No metadata leaks, no central authority.

name: Phantom ID
description: Self-sovereign identity system with selective disclosure. Prove attributes about yourself without revealing your identity.

name: Synth Brain
description: Federated learning framework for training AI models across distributed nodes without sharing raw data.

name: OnChain Oracle
description: Decentralized oracle network for verifiable off-chain data feeds. Trustless price feeds for DeFi protocols.

name: Stealth Scan
description: Privacy-focused blockchain explorer. View transactions without exposing your IP or linking queries to your wallet.
